channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump cancels fresh strikes and bombings on Iran
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran war live: Trump claims Tehran deal ‘approved’, cancels new strikes
- West Asia War LIVE: Trump cancels Iran strikes, touts imminent deal
- Iran war LIVE: Trump says ‘great’ Iran deal could be signed ‘very soon’ in Europe; Tehran still reviewing details
- Trump cancels Iran strikes, touts imminent deal
- Trump cancels Iran strikes, touts imminent deal
- Trump says scheduled US strikes on Iran have been cancelled
- Trump calls off threatened Iran strikes, says US deal could be signed this weekend
- Trump Cancels Iran Strikes, Says Tehran Has ‘Approved’ Talks
- Iran war: Trump calls off threatened strikes, says deal nearly done
- Trump says new strikes on Iran halted as negotiations show progress
- Trump says he is cancelling fresh strikes on Iran and hints at possible peace deal
- Trump calls off Iran strikes, says deal is close
- Trump cancels Iran strikes after high-level peace talks, blockade to continue
- Trump Cancels Strikes on Iran Scheduled for This Evening
- Trump cancels US strikes on Iran, citing progress in talks]]>

- Trump says US to hit Iran ‘very hard’ tonight

- Flash: Trump says the U.S. will be hitting Iran "very hard" tonight
- Trump says US will hit Iran 'very hard tonight'
- US will hit Iran 'very hard' tonight: Trump plans to take over main Iranian oil terminals]]>
